SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem.database

Class NotificationSystem

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.database.NotificationSystem
Direct Known Subclasses:
Notification
public class NotificationSystem extends Object
NotificationSystem, this should NOT be used directly but yk if someone needs it, yeah, sure. this basically touches it to the DB.

    static interface 
    NotificationSystem.NotificationsCallback
    Called with the user's notifications (newest first), or an empty list on none/error.

  • Constructor Details

    • NotificationSystem

      public NotificationSystem()

  • Method Details

    • sendNotification

      public void sendNotification(String entrantId, String message, String eventId, String sender)
      Sends a STRUCTURED notification to a user if their notification preference is enabled. "message|eventId|sender||" Appends to the user's Notifications list in Firestore.
      Parameters:
      entrantId - The ID of the user to notify.
      eventId - The notification message to append.
      sender - Who sent the message - for now it will be organizer from lottery.

    • sendNotificationAsk

      public void sendNotificationAsk(String entrantId, String message, String eventId, String sender)
      Sends a Specialized STRUCTURED notification to a user if their notification preference is enabled. "message|eventId|sender|ask|" the |aSK| is used as a feature so that the notification fragment knows that it needs to ask the waitlist thingy. New feature yada. Appends to the user's Notifications list in Firestore.
      Parameters:
      entrantId - The ID of the user to notify.
      eventId - The notification message to append.
      sender - Who sent the message - for now it will be organizer from lottery.

    • getNotifications

      public void getNotifications(String userId, NotificationSystem.NotificationsCallback callback)
      Fetches the "notification" array for the given user via ProfileManager. Returns the list reversed so the newest message appears first.
      Parameters:
      userId - The Firestore document ID of the user.
      callback - Receives the notification list (never null; empty on error/none).

    • deleteNotification

      public void deleteNotification(String userId, String message)
      Deletes notification from the stack
      Parameters:
      userId - The Firestore document ID of the user.
      message - the message that was supposed to be deleted PS: there might be error when same message.

    • logNotification

      public void logNotification(String eventId, String message)
      logs it to a system. Uses entrantId as organizer who notified.
      Parameters:
      eventId -
      message -

    • replaceNotification

      Used for Mark As Read.
